is_alien.name: is_alien
is_alien.description: The person does not provide proof of Belgian nationality.

qualifies_as_alien.name: qualifies_as_alien
qualifies_as_alien.description: The person legally qualifies as an alien under the statutory definition (does not prove Belgian nationality).

is_third_country_national.name: is_third_country_national
is_third_country_national.description: The person is not a Union citizen and not a person enjoying the Community right of free movement.

is_in_illegal_stay.name: is_in_illegal_stay
is_in_illegal_stay.description: The person is present on the territory without meeting the conditions for entry or stay.

is_subject_to_removal_procedure.name: is_subject_to_removal_procedure
is_subject_to_removal_procedure.description: The person is subject to a removal procedure.

is_subject_to_international_protection_p.name: is_subject_to_international_protection_procedure
is_subject_to_international_protection_p.description: The person is subject to a procedure for the granting of international protection.

is_subject_to_responsible_member_state_d.name: is_subject_to_responsible_member_state_determination_procedure
is_subject_to_responsible_member_state_d.description: The person is subject to a procedure for the determination of or transfer to the Member State responsible for examining the application for international protection.

individual_examination_performed.name: individual_examination_performed
individual_examination_performed.description: An individual examination has been performed for the person to assess risk of absconding.

no_residence_application_after_illegal_e.name: no_residence_application_after_illegal_entry_or_stay
no_residence_application_after_illegal_e.description: The person has not submitted a residence application following illegal entry or during illegal stay.

no_international_protection_application_.name: no_international_protection_application_within_time_limit
no_international_protection_application_.description: The person has not made their application for international protection within the statutory time limit.

used_false_information_or_documents.name: used_false_information_or_documents
used_false_information_or_documents.description: The person has used false or misleading information or false or falsified documents in a relevant procedure.

committed_fraud_or_unlawful_means.name: committed_fraud_or_unlawful_means
committed_fraud_or_unlawful_means.description: The person has committed fraud or used other unlawful means in a relevant procedure.

does_not_cooperate_with_authorities.name: does_not_cooperate_with_authorities
does_not_cooperate_with_authorities.description: The person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with authorities responsible for access, residence, establishment, and removal.

declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_me.name: declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_measure
declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_me.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with a transfer, refusal-of-entry, removal, entry ban, less coercive, liberty-restricting, or equivalent Member State measure.

failed_to_comply_with_measure.name: failed_to_comply_with_measure
failed_to_comply_with_measure.description: The person has already failed to comply with a transfer, refusal-of-entry, removal, entry ban, less coercive, liberty-restricting, or equivalent Member State measure.

subject_to_unlifted_entry_ban_in_kingdom.name: subject_to_unlifted_entry_ban_in_kingdom
subject_to_unlifted_entry_ban_in_kingdom.description: The person is subject to an entry ban in the Kingdom that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

subject_to_unlifted_entry_ban_in_member_.name: subject_to_unlifted_entry_ban_in_member_state
subject_to_unlifted_entry_ban_in_member_.description: The person is subject to an entry ban in another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

submitted_new_application_immediately_af.name: submitted_new_application_immediately_after_negative_decision
submitted_new_application_immediately_af.description: The person submitted a new residence or international protection application immediately after a decision refusing entry, residence, terminating stay, or a refusal-of-entry or removal measure.

concealed_fingerprints_in_other_state.name: concealed_fingerprints_in_other_state
concealed_fingerprints_in_other_state.description: When questioned, the person concealed that they had already provided fingerprints in another Dublin-bound State after submitting an international protection application.

submitted_multiple_applications_with_neg.name: submitted_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcome
submitted_multiple_applications_with_neg.description: The person has submitted multiple international protection or residence applications in the Kingdom or other Member States resulting in negative decisions or no residence permit.

concealed_prior_international_protection.name: concealed_prior_international_protection_application
concealed_prior_international_protection.description: When questioned, the person concealed that they had previously submitted an international protection application in another Dublin-bound State.

declared_or_file_shows_purpose_other_tha.name: declared_or_file_shows_purpose_other_than_application
declared_or_file_shows_purpose_other_tha.description: The person declared or their file shows they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an international protection or residence application.

subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_.name: subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal
subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_.description: The person is subject to a fine for submitting a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

has_valid_travel_document.name: has_valid_travel_document
has_valid_travel_document.description: The person is in possession of a valid travel document, passport, or identity document.

recognised_as_national_by_country_author.name: recognised_as_national_by_country_authority
recognised_as_national_by_country_author.description: The person has been recognised as a national by the national authority of their country, which declared itself willing to issue a laissez-passer.

falls_within_minister_laissez_passer_nat.name: falls_within_minister_laissez_passer_nationality_category
falls_within_minister_laissez_passer_nat.description: The person falls within a nationality category for which the minister may themselves issue a laissez-passer.

at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met.name: at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met
at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met.description: At least one of the objective criteria listed in paragraph 2 for risk of absconding is met by the person.

is_identified_alien.name: is_identified_alien
is_identified_alien.description: The person qualifies as an identified alien under the statutory definition.

risk_of_absconding.name: risk_of_absconding
risk_of_absconding.description: There is a legally established risk of absconding for the person, based on individual examination and at least one objective criterion.
